scripts.preinstall: node -e "const ua = process.env.npm_config_user_agent || ''; if (!ua.startsWith('pnpm/')) { console.warn('Using npm fallback mode'); }"
scripts.build: npm run typecheck && npm run build:api && npm run build:web && npm --prefix lib/db run build && npm --prefix lib/api-client-react run build && npm --prefix lib/api-zod run build
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:libs && npm --prefix artifacts/api-server run typecheck && npm --prefix artifacts/jarvis run typecheck && npm --prefix lib/db run typecheck && npm --prefix lib/api-client-react run typecheck && npm --prefix lib/api-zod run typecheck
